sources.issuing_organisation: American Society for Reproductive Medicine Practice Committee
sources.exact_document_title: Current evaluation of amenorrhea: a committee opinion (2024)
sources.population: Postmenarchal adolescents and adults presenting with primary or secondary amenorrhea, with pregnancy, age, pubertal, endocrine and anatomic qualifiers.
sources.applicability_note: Exact for recorded menstrual, pregnancy, medication, endocrine, examination and clinician-selected investigation context. It does not diagnose a cause, select treatment, or define UAE referral pathways.

exact_sections.heading: Introduction, definitions and clinical history
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports distinguishing primary and secondary amenorrhea and recording menarche, cycle, pregnancy possibility, weight, exercise, medicines, galactorrhea, androgenic and vasomotor symptoms without assigning a cause.

exact_sections.heading: Physical examination and initial laboratory evaluation
exact_sections.locator: official HTML examination and laboratory-evaluation sections
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician-performed pubertal, androgenic, thyroid and pelvic context and clinician-selected pregnancy, TSH, prolactin and FSH review; it does not auto-order or interpret tests.

exact_sections.heading: Cause-directed evaluation and imaging
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician-directed pelvic imaging and additional evaluation only after history, examination and initial results narrow the context.

archive.publisher: American Society for Reproductive Medicine Practice Committee
archive.population: Postmenarchal adolescents and adults presenting with primary or secondary amenorrhea, with pregnancy, age, pubertal, endocrine and anatomic qualifiers.

exact_relevant_sections.evidence_summary: Supports distinguishing primary and secondary amenorrhea and recording menarche, cycle, pregnancy possibility, weight, exercise, medicines, galactorrhea, androgenic and vasomotor symptoms without assigning a cause.

exact_relevant_sections.heading: Physical examination and initial laboratory evaluation
exact_relevant_sections.locator: official HTML examination and laboratory-evaluation sections
exact_relevant_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician-performed pubertal, androgenic, thyroid and pelvic context and clinician-selected pregnancy, TSH, prolactin and FSH review; it does not auto-order or interpret tests.

exact_relevant_sections.heading: Cause-directed evaluation and imaging
exact_relevant_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician-directed pelvic imaging and additional evaluation only after history, examination and initial results narrow the context.

sources.issuing_organisation: Monash University and the International PCOS Network
sources.exact_document_title: International Evidence-based Guideline for the Assessment and Management of Polycystic Ovary Syndrome 2023
sources.population: Adults and adolescents with PCOS or undergoing PCOS assessment, with recommendation-specific life-stage and diagnostic qualifiers.
sources.clinical_setting: PCOS assessment, cardiometabolic screening, psychological review, shared decision-making, and management planning.
sources.applicability_note: Exact for selected PCOS identity, cycle, hyperandrogenism, cardiometabolic, and psychological-review documentation. Diagnosis, fertility planning, treatment, medicine selection, and UAE service pathways remain clinician responsibilities.

exact_sections.heading: Guideline overview and scope
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Defines the international evidence-based PCOS assessment and management scope across relevant life stages.

exact_sections.heading: Irregular cycles and ovulatory dysfunction
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting menstrual-cycle pattern with life-stage and diagnostic qualifiers retained.

exact_sections.heading: Biochemical and clinical hyperandrogenism
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting acne, hirsutism, and clinician-reviewed biochemical hyperandrogenism assessment without asserting a diagnosis.

exact_sections.heading: Cardiovascular and diabetes risk
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports weight or BMI context, blood pressure, lipid profile, and glycaemic-status review in PCOS.

exact_sections.heading: Quality of life, depression, and anxiety
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting quality-of-life, mood, depression, and anxiety context without assigning a diagnosis.
